productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Brown Shoes
description: Classic driving shoe with a sleek, constructed silhouette from U.S. Polo Association. These slip ons are designed for comfort but the styling on the upper makes it a love-forever classic. You'll love how this shoe adds a natty edge to your outfit and is as comfortable as your bathroom slippers (we're not kidding). The contrast stitch detail is the only design detail added and it only enhances the look of the shoe. UpperTextured leather upper with slip-on stylingSoft, padded innerReinforced overlay at the heel cupBrand tab at the lateral side of the heelOutsoleTPU outsole with nubs all over the forefoot and heelShoe careWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
